news.title: Restaurant Bouchon du Centre stopt na 27 jaar: ‘De mensen ga ik missen, maar Amsterdam niet’ - Het Parool
news.summary:
# Summary

After 27 years in business, the French restaurant Bouchon du Centre is closing in Amsterdam. The owner expresses sadness about leaving the customers but not the city itself. Visitors to Amsterdam looking for classic French dining in the area will need to find an alternative, as this long-established spot will no longer be available.
